prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: IGE-ALI-11ISBCCMTWCC-SML-SLVR Product Type: MULTITOOL Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Black 11 in 1 Multi-function Credit Card Sized Tool with Sheath Description: Make sure you have the right tool in a pinch with the Black ASR Outdoor Multi Function Credit Card Tool.

This device features 11 in 1 built in functions - a sun compass, 2 position wrench, key chain hole, 4 position wrench, saw, screw wrench, can opener, bottle opener, blade, screwdriver and a ruler for good measure. Its small design will fit neatly in most credit card-sized slots in a wallet or purse. Make sure to grab a few of these to keep in your bag, backpack, vehicle or boat for an emergency. Search Terms: Survival Tool Multi-Tool Camping Features: - Practical Multi-tool Card - Fits In Most Wallets - Material: Thick Guage Steel - Extra Durable Stainless Steel - Performs 11 Functions (see picture #2) - Comes w/ Lightweight Black Sheath === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 11-in-1 Black Credit Card Multi-Tool
